title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow, ya really cleaned up! Talk about a big haul!
Nicely done, Boss!

choice_data_list: Make sure you take good care of them.

text_block_list.text:
Welcome to the family, lil' ones! We're gonna
have a blast together!
